programme.title: Nessun luogo e' lontano
programme.desc: Storie, notizie, analisi, per raccontare ogni giorno tutto ciò che accade fuori dai confini italiani. Fatti apparentemente lontani che ci riguardano sempre di più, quotidianamente.

programme.title: Leni Riefenstahl - La fine di un mito
programme.desc: Leni Riefenstahl, regista di Hitler, divide ancora. Genio o propagandista? Il documentario svela il suo uso spregiudicato di collaboratori e la sua negazione dei crimini nazisti, rivelando una carriera controversa.

programme.title: Gli Anni del Dopoguerra in Germania
programme.desc: Berlino distrutta dopo la guerra. Giovani disorientati, criminalità (Gladow). Divisione Est/Ovest, mercato nero. Ricerca di un nuovo inizio.

programme.title: Gli Anni del Dopoguerra in Germania
programme.desc: Berlino distrutta dopo la guerra. Giovani disorientati, criminalità (Gladow). Divisione Est/Ovest, mercato nero. Ricerca di un nuovo inizio.

programme.title: Il patto Hitler-Stalin
programme.desc: Il documentario esplora la partnership tra Germania nazista e URSS (1939), le loro sfere d'interesse e le conseguenze del patto Hitler-Stalin in Europa.

programme.title: La Conferenza di Wannsee
programme.desc: L’incontro durò poco meno di 90 minuti nelle stanze arredate con gusto della Villa di Wannsee. Adolf Eichmann descrisse in seguito l’atmosfera come rilassata e allegra. L’argomento era la “Soluzione finale della questione ebraica”. Si trattava dell’espulsione sistematica e dello sterminio di circa undici milioni di persone.

programme.title: La fine della guerra a Colori
programme.desc: Quando nel marzo 1945 le truppe USA conquistano la Germania nazista da ovest, vengono seguite da troupe che filmano il paese sconfitto e occupato. La particolarità: usano pellicola a colori 16mm. Il risultato è un documento unico, tra città distrutte, volti degli abitanti e orrori del regime.

programme.title: La fine della guerra a Colori
programme.desc: Quando nel marzo 1945 le truppe USA conquistano la Germania nazista da ovest, vengono seguite da troupe che filmano il paese sconfitto e occupato. La particolarità: usano pellicola a colori 16mm. Il risultato è un documento unico, tra città distrutte, volti degli abitanti e orrori del regime.

programme.title: La fine della guerra a Colori

La particolarità: usano pellicola a colori 16mm. Il risultato è un documento unico, tra città distrutte, volti degli abitanti e orrori del regime.

La particolarità: usano pellicola a colori 16mm. Il risultato è un documento unico, tra città distrutte, volti degli abitanti e orrori del regime.

programme.title: La fine della guerra a Colori
programme.desc: Quando nel marzo 1945 le truppe USA conquistano la Germania nazista da ovest, vengono seguite da troupe che filmano il paese sconfitto e occupato. La particolarità: usano pellicola a colori 16mm. Il risultato è un documento unico, tra città distrutte, volti degli abitanti e orrori del regime.

programme.title: Eva Braun
programme.desc: Solo dopo la sua morte Eva Braun entrò nell’occhio pubblico in Germania. Il 30 aprile 1945 si tolse la vita con Hitler nel bunker a Berlino, un giorno dopo averlo sposato. A lungo tenuta ai margini, visse tra Monaco e il Berghof. Una biografia recente prova a superare l’immagine della bionda passiva.

programme.title: Eva Braun
programme.desc: Solo dopo la sua morte Eva Braun entrò nell’occhio pubblico in Germania. Il 30 aprile 1945 si tolse la vita con Hitler nel bunker a Berlino, un giorno dopo averlo sposato. A lungo tenuta ai margini, visse tra Monaco e il Berghof. Una biografia recente prova a superare l’immagine della bionda passiva.

programme.title: Desert War - Fighting Rommel
programme.desc: Ancora oggi, Erwin Rommel è considerato un generale apolitico che, con idee geniali, portò gli inglesi sull’orlo della sconfitta in Nord Africa. Ma il suo mito è dovuto soprattutto alla propaganda nazista. Esperti militari analizzano gli eventi.

programme.title: Desert War - Fighting Rommel

programme.title: Hitler e la sua cerchia ristretta
programme.desc: Per decenni gli storici hanno sostenuto che Hitler non avesse vita privata e fosse un essere socialmente disturbato. In uno studio innovativo, Heike Görtemaker ha rivelato che aveva relazioni e amicizie. Il suo circolo ristretto era il suo rifugio, basato su lealtà assoluta fino alla fine nel 1945.

programme.title: Hitler e la sua cerchia ristretta
programme.desc: Per decenni gli storici hanno sostenuto che Hitler non avesse vita privata e fosse un essere socialmente disturbato. programme.title: Il Terzo Reich a colori
programme.desc: Archivi privati rivelano inediti filmati a colori del Terzo Reich: Normandia, feste, atrocità della Wehrmacht e vita di Hitler, offrendo un'opprimente realtà del regime nazista.

programme.title: Il Terzo Reich a colori
programme.desc: Archivi privati rivelano inediti filmati a colori del Terzo Reich: Normandia, feste, atrocità della Wehrmacht e vita di Hitler, offrendo un'opprimente realtà del regime nazista.

programme.title: Il Terzo Reich a Colori
programme.desc: Archivi privati rivelano inediti filmati a colori del Terzo Reich: Normandia, feste, atrocità della Wehrmacht e vita di Hitler, offrendo un'opprimente realtà del regime nazista.

programme.title: Il Cacciatore di Nazisti - Anton Freud e l'Operazione Haystack
programme.desc: Nell’inverno del 1945/46, un gruppo di uomini in jeep e Harley attraversa la Germania settentrionale a caccia di criminali nazisti. Si tratta di membri dell’Unità Investigativa sui Crimini di Guerra, nome in codice “Operazione haystack”, e tra loro c’è il maggiore Anton Walter Freud, il nipote di Sigmund Freud. Anton è rientrato in Germania appena finita la guerra e, come ufficiale dei servizi segreti britannici, sta cercando di rintracciare nella zona di occupazione britannica i nazisti ricercati: assassini in uniforme, brutali scagnozzi delle SS e medici spietati che conducevano esperimenti su bambini sotto gli ordini di Josef Mengele.

programme.title: 1945 - La guerra in prima linea in Germania
programme.desc: Quando le truppe americane iniziarono la loro invasione finale della Germania nazista a metà febbraio del 1945, i cineoperatori dell’esercito statunitense erano al loro fianco. Ripresero molte ore di straordinario materiale su pellicola da 35 mm. Più di mille rulli sono stati conservati negli archivi americani; molti di essi non sono stati toccati per decenni. Mostrano per la Seconda Guerra Mondiale ciò che abbiamo visto finora solo per le guerre in Vietnam e, più recentemente, in Iraq. Integrati nelle truppe, i cineoperatori documentarono numerose storie di vittoria e sconfitta, morte e liberazione. Volti di disperazione e gioia, scene di guerra e di pace, filmate con meticolosità da...

programme.title: 1945 - La guerra in prima linea in Germania
programme.desc: Quando le truppe americane iniziarono la loro invasione finale della Germania nazista a metà febbraio del 1945, i cineoperatori dell’esercito statunitense erano al loro fianco. programme.title: La televisione sotto la svastica
programme.desc: Il documentario svela la nascita della televisione in Germania nazista, antecedente agli anni ’50 americani. Filmati inediti mostrano programmi, eventi e interviste dal Terzo Reich, rivelando una propaganda estetica e ideologica diversa da quella conosciuta, con immagini straordinarie.

programme.title: Operazione Barbarossa
programme.desc: L'Operazione Barbarossa (1941) fu l'invasione nazista dell'URSS, un'aggressione brutale. Nonostante i successi iniziali, la Wehrmacht sottovalutò la resistenza sovietica e l'immensità del territorio. Il conflitto, segnato da atrocità e ordini criminali, divenne una guerra di annientamento, fallendo nella conquista di Mosca.

programme.title: Operazione Barbarossa
programme.desc: L'invasione nazista dell'URSS nel 1941, l'Operazione Barbarossa, si trasformò in una guerra di annientamento. Nonostante i successi iniziali, la Wehrmacht sottovalutò la resistenza sovietica e l'immensità del territorio. L'inverno e la determinazione sovietica fermarono l'avanzata tedesca, segnando il fallimento dell'operazione e l'inizio di un conflitto brutale.

programme.title: Operazione Barbarossa
programme.desc: L'Operazione Barbarossa si arena a Mosca, ma Hitler rilancia l'offensiva nel 1942 verso il Caucaso e Stalingrado. La Wehrmacht, pur potente, affronta una resistenza sovietica più esperta e una logistica insostenibile. La battaglia di Stalingrado si rivela un disastro per i tedeschi, segnando una svolta psicologica e militare nella guerra.

programme.title: Leni Riefenstahl - La fine di un mito
programme.desc: Leni Riefenstahl, regista di Hitler, divide ancora. Genio o propagandista? Il documentario svela il suo uso spregiudicato di collaboratori e la sua negazione dei crimini nazisti, rivelando una carriera controversa.

programme.title: Gli Anni del Dopoguerra in Germania
programme.desc: Berlino distrutta dopo la guerra. Giovani disorientati, criminalità (Gladow). Divisione Est/Ovest, mercato nero. Ricerca di un nuovo inizio.

programme.title: Gli Anni del Dopoguerra in Germania
programme.desc: Berlino distrutta dopo la guerra. Giovani disorientati, criminalità (Gladow). Divisione Est/Ovest, mercato nero. Ricerca di un nuovo inizio.

programme.title: Il patto Hitler-Stalin
programme.desc: Il documentario esplora la partnership tra Germania nazista e URSS (1939), le loro sfere d'interesse e le conseguenze del patto Hitler-Stalin in Europa.

programme.title: La Conferenza di Wannsee
programme.desc: L’incontro durò poco meno di 90 minuti nelle stanze arredate con gusto della Villa di Wannsee. Adolf Eichmann descrisse in seguito l’atmosfera come rilassata e allegra. L’argomento era la “Soluzione finale della questione ebraica”. Si trattava dell’espulsione sistematica e dello sterminio di circa undici milioni di persone.

programme.title: La fine della guerra a Colori
programme.desc: Quando nel marzo 1945 le truppe USA conquistano la Germania nazista da ovest, vengono seguite da troupe che filmano il paese sconfitto e occupato. La particolarità: usano pellicola a colori 16mm. Il risultato è un documento unico, tra città distrutte, volti degli abitanti e orrori del regime.

programme.title: Eva Braun
programme.desc: Solo dopo la sua morte Eva Braun entrò nell’occhio pubblico in Germania. Il 30 aprile 1945 si tolse la vita con Hitler nel bunker a Berlino, un giorno dopo averlo sposato. A lungo tenuta ai margini, visse tra Monaco e il Berghof. Una biografia recente prova a superare l’immagine della bionda passiva.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E09 - Bull In The Bush
programme.desc: After more than three weeks trekking through moose country, brothers Chris and Casey Keefer finally set up camp in a new spot and almost immediately come face-to-face with a massive bull.

programme.title: Dropped - S03:E10 - End Of The Line
programme.desc: With the odds piling against them, the 80-mile river adventure is almost over, and brothers Chris and Casey Keefer have one final opportunity to find an Alaskan moose just a few miles from where they'll be picked up at the river junction.

programme.title: Wardens - S03:E06 - Operation Trespass
programme.desc: Montana Game Wardens are keeping an eye out for people breaking hunting laws, like trespassing, hunting too early, hunting from cars, or taking spike elk.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, nerves begin to fray for Charlie Summerville and his team as they embark on constructing the wilderness cabin.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E03 - S-Smart Terry
programme.desc: Give me some sugar baby. Terry travels through time where he will test the cult favourite, Army of Darkness. Terry not only gets to test several scenes, but also gets a sit down with the legendary Bruce Campbell.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S05:E04 - Terry's Brave Heart
programme.desc: Terry gets to annoy Larry with his impersonation of William Wallace from Braveheart. He not only gets to wield Sir William's sword, but also convinces Larry to build him a trebuchet.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E02 - The Fergie Story Paradise Lost
programme.desc: When Andrew and Sarah Ferguson tied the knot, she soon became one of the most popular women to be called the Duchess of York since the title was created back in 1385.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E11 - True North
programme.desc: Arctic Pt2. Inuit Elders provide guidance as Jim and Corey prepare to face the ice once again on a special invite to document a traditional Inuit hunting expedition.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E07 - Hawaii Access Shane Dorian
programme.desc: The number of axis deer in Hawaii has exploded, making them a big problem for this stunning Pacific paradise. In this episode, Mario meets up with Shane Dorian, a big wave surfer, as they head out on an expedition.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E08 - Talking Turkey Frank Stallone
programme.desc: Mario teams up with Frank Stalone and heads to Kansas to find Easton turkeys. With Frank's Italian roots, Mario is sure they can create turkey meatballs that taste incredible.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E09 - Backcountry Ice Man Chuck Liddell
programme.desc: Former UFC lightweight champ, Chuck Liddell, and Mario ride horseback in the mountains of Idaho, venturing into bear territory. They're on the hunt for a mysterious protein source.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E10 - 1000 Tuna Quest
programme.desc: Mario heads to the far eastern edge of Canada to visit Prince Edward Island. It's famous for having some of the largest bluefin tuna in the world, with these fish reaching up to 1000 pounds.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E05 - Mountain Mule Deer
programme.desc: Sasquatch, Laramy Miller, hunts the badlands of Montana for mule deer.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E06 - Bear
programme.desc: Laramy is in search of a bear with his Hawken rifle. The bear will be used to provide Laramy with warmth in the cold winters ahead

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E07 - Mountain Lion 1
programme.desc: Laramy Miller rides on horseback with his dogs by his side, hunting the elusive mountain lion in the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E08 - Mountain Lion 2
programme.desc: Laramy Sasquatch Miller continues his hunt for a mountain lion.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E05 - Masters of Attack
programme.desc: Carnivores can't just pick their meals off trees. To survive, they have to use every trick they've got to catch food that's just as keen on staying alive as they are. If their prey hides, they have to find it. If it runs, they must chase it. They have to track it if it's hard to pin down and beat it if it fights back. The predator might use its strength for the final blow, but the real effort lies in the strategy.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E06 - Devious Defenses
programme.desc: Animals can employ a number of different defenses in order to withstand an attack. Some seek safety in herds, some hide in plain sight, some meet aggression with even stronger aggression, and some build fortresses. Whatever the strategy it is clear that animals will do whatever it takes to survive the wild.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E11 - True North
programme.desc: Arctic Pt2. Inuit Elders provide guidance as Jim and Corey prepare to face the ice once again on a special invite to document a traditional Inuit hunting expedition.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E07 - Hawaii Access Shane Dorian
programme.desc: The number of axis deer in Hawaii has exploded, making them a big problem for this stunning Pacific paradise. In this episode, Mario meets up with Shane Dorian, a big wave surfer, as they head out on an expedition.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E08 - Talking Turkey Frank Stallone
programme.desc: Mario teams up with Frank Stalone and heads to Kansas to find Easton turkeys. With Frank's Italian roots, Mario is sure they can create turkey meatballs that taste incredible.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E09 - Backcountry Ice Man Chuck Liddell
programme.desc: Former UFC lightweight champ, Chuck Liddell, and Mario ride horseback in the mountains of Idaho, venturing into bear territory. They're on the hunt for a mysterious protein source.

programme.title: Man Eats Wild - S02:E10 - 1000 Tuna Quest
programme.desc: Mario heads to the far eastern edge of Canada to visit Prince Edward Island. It's famous for having some of the largest bluefin tuna in the world, with these fish reaching up to 1000 pounds.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E05 - Mountain Mule Deer
programme.desc: Sasquatch, Laramy Miller, hunts the badlands of Montana for mule deer.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S02:E06 - Bear
programme.desc: Laramy is in search of a bear with his Hawken rifle. The bear will be used to provide Laramy with warmth in the cold winters ahead

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E11 - Royal Children Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E26 - Prince William A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: Explore the exciting and intriguing life of the future king, Prince William, in this engaging documentary.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E30 - Prince William And Prince Harry Prisoners Of Celebrity
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E12 - The New Royals
programme.desc: Princesses Beatrice and Eugenie have gone through a lot of media attention and tough situations in their lives. From their parents' very public split to being targeted by the press, they've been through quite a bit. Despite all this, they remain dedicated to supporting the monarchy with their charity work. Through serving the Commonwealth, both sisters continue to make a positive impact.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E10 - Stockholm and Lisbon
programme.desc: For a weekend winter break, Stockholm has got to be one of most beautiful cities to visit. Made up of 14 separate islands, it’s one of the best-preserved and largest mediaeval cities in Europe. Then some summer sun in the Portuguese capitol, Lisbon, for a whistle stop cultural tour of the city and a surfing lesson along the coast.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E11 - The Loire and Grenada
programme.desc: There’s more to the Loire Valley in France than wine. We’re on the Da Vinci trail, following in the last footsteps and final resting place of the great Leonardo da Vinci in the small town of Amboise, deep in the heart of the Loire. Then for the ultimate in relaxation it’s a pamper and spa break in Grenada.

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre sono protagoniste di un'asta nella quale sono in palio alcuni ingredienti; per aggiudicarsi gli alimenti, ogni team ha a disposizione un budget di 4000 hells, una valuta fittizia con su stampata l'effigie di Cracco. Al termine dell'asta, lo chef Cracco annuncia che con gli ingredienti comprati bisogna preparare tre piatti vegetariani in quarantacinque minuti; per la valutazione, le due squadre nominano un portavoce (Gianluca per i blu e Lorenza per i rossi) che ha il compito di presentare allo chef i tre piatti in ordine crescente dal meno riuscito al più riuscito. La sfida viene vinta dalla squadra rossa, che ottiene come ricompensa una lezione dello chef sulla...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Per la prova in esterna, le squadre vengono condotti in un bosco all'interno del quale sono nascosti alcuni ingredienti. Seguendo due percorsi stabiliti, i concorrenti devono raccogliere tutti gli ingredienti che riescono a trovare e poi utilizzarli per preparare un piatto di carne alla griglia. La squadra vincitrice ha come ricompensa un pomeriggio in un centro benessere e inoltre ha diritto all'ingresso di un nuovo membro: Tommaso per i blu ed Erica per i rossi. La prova viene vinta dai blu e Tommaso entra ufficialmente a far parte di Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco comunica alle squadre che il ristorante aprirà eccezionalmente anche a pranzo e la prova sarà proprio gestire il servizio. I clienti sono un gruppo di bambini e il menu è fatto apposta per loro (pasta al pomodoro, hamburger e patatine fritte, profiteroles) e la squadra vincitrice sarà quella che riuscirà a concludere per prima il servizio. Nonostante un iniziale vantaggio dei blu, la squadra rossa si aggiudica la vittoria e viene ricompensata con un pomeriggio all'interno di un parco acquatico, mentre i perdenti sono costretti a ripulire la sala e le cucine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre ottengono dallo chef Cracco il potere di creare un proprio menu da proporre ai clienti con gli ingredienti presenti in dispensa. Nel frattempo però le squadre si affrontano in esterna: all'interno di un grande ipermercato ogni concorrente deve scegliere casualmente due bandierine che raffigurano gli stemmi delle varie regioni italiane; ad ogni bandierina sono associati degli ingredienti tipici della regione, che devono essere usati per ideare un piatto che racchiuda elementi di entrambe le regioni. Lo chef passa quindi a decidere quali siano le quattro idee migliori e sceglie Sybil e Laura per i rossi e Gene e Matteo per i blu. I quattro cuochi preparano i piatti nelle...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il vincitore della prima sfida andrà a cena con William Shatner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Durante il servizio serale, un Gordon infuriato caccia un'intera squadra fuori dalla cucina.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef hanno il compito di abbinare le teste di pesce al resto del corpo correttamente.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre sono sfidate a creare portate con spaghetti, hamburger, pizza e maccheroni al formaggio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le squadre devono creare i piatti più deliziosi a base di formaggio al fine di vincere un'avventura in oceano.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef creano un servizio speciale a pranzo in onore di due enti di beneficenza gestiti dai vigili del fuoco di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questa volta, gli chef devono preparare un pasto greco

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef devono preparare un piatto usando una bevanda alcolica, chesia vino, birra o superalcolici.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Oggi, gli chef si trovano di fronte a una selezione di alimenti proteici esotici tra cui un alligatore.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida di oggi è preparare una cena di bentornato per il liceo Calabasas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef servono un pasto composto di sei portate per due associazioni di beneficenza.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: È la serata delle bistecche, ma i continui errori di uno chef porteranno alla loro eliminazione?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dopo una cena disastrosa, il suo agnello cotto alla perfezione potrà salvare Josh dal taglio?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef preparano delle portate in piccole porzioni per i partecipanti di una performance sinfonica privata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Le emozioni sono alle stelle poiché ogni concorrente in gara fa un turno da capo chef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chi sarà presto a capo del proprio ristorante ora che l’annuncio del vincitore di quest’anno si avvicina?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I diciotto chef si dirigono a Las Vegas e cucinano il loro piatto forte prima di essere valutati.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Ci sarà il caos quando The Game e il suo entourage si presenteranno a una cena senza preavviso?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef devono fare una sfida di comunicazione. L'astronauta Buzz Aldrin partecipa alla cena.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Quale squadra servirà la cena migliora a base d’anatra a Kris Jenner e Dita Von Teese?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Un servizio disastroso porta a un’eliminazione scioccante.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Essendoci una situazione di sbilanciamento numerico degli elementi all'interno delle due squadre, Cracco dà ai rossi il compito di nominare una persona che passerà nei blu. Sybil si propone per lo scambio, per via delle divergenze caratteriali con Carmelo e quindi diviene un elemento della squadra blu. Per la prima sfida, i due team si scontrano in una prova di velocità: un concorrente per ogni squadra si deve lanciare in una vasca piena di ghiaccio e cercare un'etichetta con il nome di un ingrediente; il più veloce si aggiudica l'ingrediente scelto e può imporre allo sfidante sconfitto un ingrediente ostico fra quelli proposti da Cracco. Alla fine i concorrenti devono utilizzare...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Le due squadre si trovano da Peck a Milano: ogni concorrente deve scegliere un sacchetto a sorpresa, contenente un ingrediente molto pregiato; le squadre devono preparare un piatto utilizzando gli ingredienti scelti, ma una volta effettuata la scelta il concorrente può decidere se accettare l'ingrediente oppure pescare da una cassetta un bigliettino con su scritta una tipologia di ingrediente da reperire all'interno del negozio. Per ogni squadra possono cucinare solo due elementi scelti da Cracco: Francesca e Lorenza per i rossi, Gianluca e Carmelo per i blu. La sfida viene vinta dai blu che ottengono come ricompensa un pomeriggio in una pista per go-kart insieme allo chef Cracco. I rossi...

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il servizio per i rossi é altamente problematico e Gene, autoproclamato leader della squadra ordina a Lorenza di mettere delle taccole nel bollitore dove Laura stava cuocendo la pasta.I blu vincono e i rossi nominano Gene e Lorenza ma Cracco nomina Laura al posto di Gene

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il loft di hell's kitchen é invaso dai paparazzi, come prova esterna si recano in una mostra fotografica dove devono disegnare e creare un piatto, nonostante uno svantaggio da parte di Francesca che deve ricrearlo la prova la vince al ballottaggio con Carmelo i vincitori vengono intervistati mentre i perdenti devono ripulire il loft e preparare un aperitivo per i vincitori. Il servizio è molto difficile Laura e Gene sono ai ferri corti per la storia delle taccole di Lorenza, mentre tra i blu Sybil va nel panico ma prontamente calmata da Cracco, Gene rigira la frittata a suo piacimento con un giudizio. I blu vincono e le nomination sono Gene e Laura

programme.desc: Quick delivery! Jordi's ice cream cart got stuck in mud. Help Jordi get the cheese ice cream in time before it melts. Let's go Wonderstars! Rachel sings Wonderville's super popular song 'Yum Yum Pie' and the friends shout for the encore! But nobody wants to hear the songs that Rachel wrote. Wonderstar suggests a concert with Rachel's amazing songs! Will they succeed?

programme.title: Pinkfong Wonderstar
programme.desc: Chumli got coverd in sticky acorn nut butter! Help me, Wonderstar! I have to wash it off before my body turns into a statue! Here's the mission! Find the missing bananas! The bananas that are supposed to be in Codi's cart are all gone. What happened? Codi finds Wonderstar for help.

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: "Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs."

programme.title: Happy 1st Birthday Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family.

programme.title: Baby Shark Halloween Fun
programme.desc: Emergency! Emergency! Strange things are happening in town as darkness falls on Halloween night! But with the Police Shark Family on duty, even the spookiest Halloween is no problem at all!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Ninimo Animal Songs
programme.desc: Pinkfong's new friend Ninimo! Shall we sing animal songs together?

programme.title: Baby shark's Transformation
programme.desc: Let's learn colors and shapes with Baby Shark! You're watching "Baby Shark's Transformation", a super fun story for kids to learn colors.

programme.title: Vampire Wedding with Hogi
programme.desc: Come, and join Jeni and Billi's wedding ceremony!

programme.title: Space dogs
programme.desc: Un giorno due cagnette vengono rapite da una misteriosa automobile e portate in un centro spaziale, dove, sotto la guida del cane istruttore Kazbek e aiutate dal topolino Venya, verranno addestrate per la conquista dello spazio...o quasi..

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: Mentre Josh è al college, sua sorella Andrea e Buddy entrano a far parte della squadra di baseball. Ancore una volta, a Buddy viene naturale qualsiasi cosa che includa una palla!

programme.desc: La sorella più giovane di Barbie, Chelsea, viene iscritta a una gara di biciclette locale dalla sua amica, ma si sente imbarazzata perché non riesce a pedalare senza le rotelle.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun

programme.desc: Quando Albert va a vivere con Harriet Franklin, l'amica d'infanzia ferocemente indipendente di sua madre, non arriva da solo.

programme.title: Il fantastico mondo di Aladino
programme.desc: Calvin, un giovane commesso della pizza a domicilio, viene portato nella Bagdad dell'ottavo secolo grazie al Genio della lampada. Qui, con l'aiuto di Alì Babà e della principessa Sherazade, recupererà la lampada di Aladino.

programme.title: Un'estate per diventare grandi

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Jesse Magallanes was raised in an Argentinian household, but he knows there's more to his ancestry. Host Tyrone Edwards reveals the results of his DNA test and Jesse begins his journey of self-discovery.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Derek Dammann demonstrates talent and skills in demystifying the potato, using tons of terrific techniques"...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Chef Leah Wildman whips up a lamb stew, and grilled shrimp lemongrass kabobs, then challenges herself to combine lamb and lemongrass in one dish.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Nothing's more warm and soothing than Argentinian comfort food and host Natalia Machado shows us how to make some!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: 30-minute meals have never tasted this good! Chef Spencer Watts offers up some secrets for the perfect fish and chips dinner.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Culinary expert Theresa Visintin picks the letter "B" and must combine beef with buttermilk for her challenge. But first, she works with the ingredients separately. Silky buttermilk lends itself perfectly to Theresa's battered blooming onion recipe. Using the biggest onion she can find, Theresa skillfully slices from the root down, ensuring it will bloom into a beautiful flower. She coats the Vidalia onion in egg, buttermilk and smoky spiced flour, before deep frying it. Next up, it's time for beef to get the Theresa treatment, as she prepares a crowd favourite- smoky, juicy, fall-off-thebone baked beef brisket. With the perfect balance of sweet and spicy, this meal will make you look...

programme.title: Watts On the Grill
programme.desc: Barbeque is not just about meat! Chef Spencer Watts shows us how to grill fruits and vegetables like a pro.

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular raw recipes, from hosts like Pino De Cirbo and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev prepares comforting street food dishes from around the world, including Bindaetteok Pancakes from South Korea, Chicken Tamales from Mexico, and Sausage Rolls from the UK.

programme.title: Global Street Eats
programme.desc: Chef Dev shows off street food dishes from around the world that feature basil, including Pesto Rice Balls from Italy, Holy Basil Chicken from Thailand, and Green Papaya and Beef Jerky Salad with Thai Basil from Vietnam.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make soccer day lunch for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: cold cheesy beef burritos, black bean and corn salads, and watermelon with chili and lime!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Indonesia - Tomato Nasi Goreng, Greece - Greek Melon Salad, Syria - Kidney Bean Hummus, and Thailand - Coconut Curry Cabbage Rolls!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Pasta Every Day by Meryl Feinstein! Follow along as Shahir demonstrates how to make a variety of pasta shapes, like cavatelli, farfalle, and gnocchi, complete with delicious sauces!

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: If you are talking about Irish food, it's hard not to talk about Corned Beef and Cabbage. On this episode of CombiNATION Plates, Chef Craig Wong delivers his unusual take using Beef Cheek, modern technique, and a caraway-infused Carrot Terrine for fun! Next up is a tribute to Izakaya eats, featuring Tare Grilled Duck Hearts, Miso-roasted Mushroom, and Agedashi Tofu. The featured common ingredient is Oysters. For Ireland, it's Garlic GratineÌe; for Japan, check out the Kaki Yaki, oysters broiled with miso and rich Japanese Kewpie mayo. For the final dish, light up! Smoking is permitted! Check out blowtorch-seared and tableside-smoked Wagyu Beef, brushed with Irish Stout Teriyaki and...

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Jesse Magallanes was raised in an Argentinian household, but he knows there's more to his ancestry. Host Tyrone Edwards reveals the results of his DNA test and Jesse begins his journey of self-discovery.

programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Derek Dammann demonstrates talent and skills in demystifying the potato, using tons of terrific techniques"...

programme.desc: Chef Leah Wildman whips up a lamb stew, and grilled shrimp lemongrass kabobs, then challenges herself to combine lamb and lemongrass in one dish.

programme.desc: Nothing's more warm and soothing than Argentinian comfort food and host Natalia Machado shows us how to make some!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: 30-minute meals have never tasted this good! Chef Spencer Watts offers up some secrets for the perfect fish and chips dinner.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Luis Valenzuela fries up classic Mexican bean recipes, proving that the side dish can also be the main attraction.

programme.title: The Latin Kitchen
programme.desc: Passionate cook Juan Pablo Gonzalez introduces us to the arepa, a Venezuelan specialty, and shows four different and delicious fillings.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.desc: Desiree Nielsen shows how beets can make the icing on a delectable cupcake vibrant and delicious.

programme.title: The Urban Vegetarian
programme.desc: Foodie Desiree Nielsen gives life to spotty bananas, transforming it into melt-in-your-mouth bread.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever
programme.desc: Chef Kyle Crawford unveils four spellbinding dishes! First up, clams and artichoke! Next, radicchio risotto. Followed by an Arabic twist on baked potatoes! Finishing with a BC roasted salmon!

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts whips up some garlicky treats with escargot mushroom puff pastry tarts and more.

programme.title: Bring On The Karbs
programme.desc: Chefs Erica and Josh Karbelnik go head-to-head to see who can come up with the most tantalizing bar bites! Josh makes fried halloumi, whitefish tartar, and a salad based on a drink, while Erica prepares beef tartare, escargot, and sliders!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make soccer day lunch for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: cold cheesy beef burritos, black bean and corn salads, and watermelon with chili and lime!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: After picking "M" for this episode's challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to make meal magic using maple and mahi-mahi. She starts by combining chestnut and quinoa to create a mouth-watering medley, rich in flavour and texture. Chef Lauren adds shiitake mushrooms and drizzles the dish with a balsamic vinegar, maple syrup and rosemary dressing. Next up, she steams Mahi-mahi with red chilies and lemongrass, this savoury spice is a heavenly combination with an invigorating aroma. For the challenge, Chef Lauren seamlessly introduces both maple and mahimahi into one flavourful fusion.

programme.title: Cook Like A Chef
programme.desc: Join Chef Craig Wong as he teaches us his tricks for building beautiful bowls full of broth and flavour in his celebration of soup.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.desc: Alliums include staples like onions, garlic, leeks, and chives"... you'll love Chef Derek Dammann's skillful tips and tricks for using them all!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Here's a tongue twister: Theresa, tuna, tangerine! In this episode, host Theresa Visintin picks her favourite letter, "T," and introduces us to scrumptious recipes using tuna and tangerine. Theresa loves tuna and Italian cuisine, so naturally she combines both to create a mouth-watering pasta with some savoury tomato, olive, and tuna sauce. Next, Theresa satisfies her sweet tooth with a decadent tangerine parfait! Using the sweet juice of the tangerine, Theresa creates gelatin, with a hint of orange liqueur. She tops it all off by whipping up a fluffy cream to complete this sweet treat. Then it's time for a real challenge: tuna and tangerine in one recipe!

programme.title: Gusto's QR Countdown
programme.desc: Unlock Gusto TV's top recipes on QR Countdown! Thousands of viewers scan our QR codes to access our delicious dishes. Now, we're serving up 8 of our most popular raw recipes, from hosts like Pino De Cirbo and Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: Cheese or chocolate? Why not both! In this "C" challenge, host Theresa Visintin takes on both decadent ingredients. But first, she shows us that being cheesy is easy, especially when you stuff chicken breast with creamy goat's cheese and finely diced apples. Theresa takes the flavour one step further by coating the stuffed chicken with sage, parmesan, and panko bread crumbs, then frying it to a crispy golden brown. Next, Theresa whips up a dessert fan favourite, the decadent and oh-so-irresistible dark chocolate lava cake. Finally, Theresa has an irresistible recipe using ooey gooey cheese and warm chocolate.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Laird Hercules that his DNA includes other ancestry besides Guyanese. In the DNA Dinners kitchen, he cooks up a delicious meal that combines his known and newfound cultures.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.desc: Mary Bosco is Italian, but Host Tyrone Edwards surprises her by revealing that her DNA test includes roots from other places. Mary cooks a special meal for her family that combines her two cultures.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: The popular region of Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights. Chef Michael Bonacini introduces us to Tuscany's fine cuisine with four of his favourite dishes. Michael draws attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture with an antipasto: Many Mushroom soup. Warm, hearty, and full of earthy flavour, Michael tops this soup with fried sage leaves to combine comfort and crunch in a single bite. For his primo, Michael explores a Tuscan favourite - Lamb Ragu! Served over pici noodles, Michael's rich ragu is complemented by fresh, light herbs. Then, Michael serves up a Porchetta-Style Duck, a crispy and tender secondo. To bring his meal together, Michael ends...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all. Host Michael Bonacini begins with the sea as he serves up an antipasto of succulent Soft Shell Crab. Michael pairs the crab with a Tangy Aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy. Moving inland for his primo, Michael twists together two classic Venetian dishes to make a new favourite: Radicchio Risotto! With his secondo, Michael cooks up a light and creamy Pancetta-Wrapper Snapper with Pea Mash. Sweet and tender, this dish will melt in your mouth. Whether you're in the mood to share or feeling a little selfish, Michael's Giant Almond Crumb Biscuit covers it...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Puglia's lush landscape and large coastline characterize its cuisine. Chef Michael Bonacini explores its native ingredients through some of Puglia's favourite meals. First up, Michael's antipasto is a guaranteed crunchy bite with crispy Fried Mussels. Stepping away from the sea, Michael highlights Puglia's prize crop: tomatoes! Combining colourful tomatoes with flavourful burrata cheese, Michael cooks up comfort in a bowl with his Tomato and Burrata Risotto. Taking on a more festive flair, Michael introduces us to Little Pork Bombs, the hottest street food in Puglia. With a filling of fresh herbs and melted cheese, these pork skewers are savoury and irresistible. Then, Michael introduces...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine and Chef Michael Bonacini explores just how the region balances simplicity with intensity through four flavourful dishes. Starting with an antipasto of Folded Flatbread with Ricotta and Fennel Seeds, Michael inspires with its intricate beauty with a simple recipe. Keeping to the theme of simplicity, Michael shows that plenty of flavour can come from little ingredients in his primo of Broccoli and Sausage Rigatoni. The spicy sausage and chili is countered by a creamy broccoli pesto for a dish that highlights Sicilian cuisine. Michael turns to the Italian queen of crops for his secondo: Eggplant Parmesan Roll-Ups. With thin slices of eggplant rolled...

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: In this episode, Chef Robert Jewell explores recipes using two very different ingredients that start with the letter "O," oats and okra. For his first dish, Robert uses okra in a classic cornmeal cake recipe, but bumps up the flavour factor with spicy jalapenos. Robert balances the heat of the jalapeno with a tart green tomato and crunchy red onion salsa. In his next recipe, Robert keeps the heat, but switches up his recipes for a curry-spiced oat pancake. This Indian inspired dish needs something to cool it down and Robert knows exactly what that is - sweet, silky applesauce! He's up for the challenge when it comes to combining okra and oats into one dish, and the results are tasty!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make soccer day lunch for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: cold cheesy beef burritos, black bean and corn salads, and watermelon with chili and lime!

programme.title: A is for Apple
programme.desc: After picking "M" for this episode's challenge, Chef Lauren Gulyas decides to make meal magic using maple and mahi-mahi. She starts by combining chestnut and quinoa to create a mouth-watering medley, rich in flavour and texture. Chef Lauren adds shiitake mushrooms and drizzles the dish with a balsamic vinegar, maple syrup and rosemary dressing. Next up, she steams Mahi-mahi with red chilies and lemongrass, this savoury spice is a heavenly combination with an invigorating aroma. For the challenge, Chef Lauren seamlessly introduces both maple and mahimahi into one flavourful fusion.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Filled with ruins in its bustling streets, the region of Lazio sticks with grandeur in all it does, including food! To introduce us to Lazio, Host Michael Bonacini highlights its Jewish influence with a crispy Roman Jewish-style Artichokes. As crunchy as a potato chip, Michael's artichokes are a delicious fried treat that are a perfect way to kick off a delicious meal. For his primo Michael brings together simple ingredients to create a rich Bucatini with Amatriciana Sauce. Michael's secondo turns what was once peasant food into a delectable and tender dish. Cooked with a blend of vegetables and sauce, Michael's Braised Oxtail brings forth the history of cuisine. Returning to Rome for his...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Campania's beautiful coastline is filled with two things: tourists and seafood. Diving into the culture of the region, Celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini begins his meal with a salad from the Island of Capri. Putting a twist on the classic dish, Michael's Grilled Caprese Salad combines fresh tomatoes, tangy balsamic, and a hint of sweetness from basil. For his primo, Michael serves up bold flavours with his Spaghetti Puttanesca. Mixing salty and sweet, this sauce offers a delicious take on the typical plate of spaghetti. Looking to the coast for his secondo, Michael quickly cooks up aromatic and spicy Herb-stuffed Scallops and Grilled Broccoli Rabe. For his dolce Michael whips up a dessert...

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini delves into the Italian region of Emilia- Romagna to discover its iconic cuisine. To start, Michael stays light with an airy Mortadella Mousse spread on fluffy Modena Mini Flatbreads. Next, Michael cooks up Tortellini in Broth, a dish originally from Bologna that can be easily altered to personal taste. Michael chooses to fill his tortellini with a rich and savoury mixture of prosciutto, mortadella, and ground pork. For his secondo, Michael uses traditional ingredients and pairs them in a tart, luxurious dish of Duck Breast with Balsamic Cherry Sauce. To wind down his meal, Michael whips up a creamy classic, Rice Custard Cake topped with a Cherry Glaze.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini explores sweet and spicy dishes hailing from the coastal region of Calabria. For his antipasto, Michael cooks up a light and refreshing Brioche with Gelato. Fluffy brioche buns surround the sweet flavours of gelato for a delicious start to your meal. Switching to spice for the primo, Michael introduces a Spicy Sausage and Ricotta Pasta. Full of sweet, savoury, and spicy flavours, this dish provides a strong, flavourful meal sure to please any crowd. For his secondo, Michael goes for a hearty Lamb au Gratin with Peas and Asparagus; a classic holiday dish that will warm any room. For his finale, Michael whips up a simple, yet impressive, Chocolate-covered Figs.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Calabria
programme.desc: Malini explores Calabria, a hidden gem in Southern Italy. While its coastal towns like Tropea and Scilla boast turquoise seas, Calabria’s true charm lies in its rural interior, where traditions like handmade pasta, cheese, and salami are still alive. She visits ghost villages like Pentedattilo in the Aspromonte mountains and experiences authentic Calabrian culture, food, and hospitality, hosted by Calabria Etnica.

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta travels to San Vito Lo Capo in Sicily, retracing the footsteps of Saracen pirates who once haunted the Mediterranean. Amid coastal landscapes and historical echoes, the journey explores local traditions shaped by centuries of cultural exchange. Couscous, legends, and sea stories bring the spirit of Sicily’s past vividly to life.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Just south of Naples, we'll experience the breathtaking Amalfi Coast, including trendy Positano, the limoncello charms of Sorrento, the ancient Greek temples at Paestum, and the Blue Grotto hidden beneath the enchanting Isle of Capri.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Whats On Italy Tradition and Trends
programme.desc: At the heart of the Mediterranean, Italy’s event calendar comes alive through the Mediterranea Metal Cruise at sea, the innovation-driven SIGMA Rome, the Med Film Festival and MedFilm Festival celebrating Mediterranean cinema, and the Cous Cous Fest, where food becomes a symbol of cultural exchange.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Whats On Malta Skies and Sea
programme.desc: Malta’s event calendar blends food, music, innovation, and heritage, from the flavours of the Malta International Food Festival to the electronic energy of Glitch Festival. Spectacle takes to the skies at the Malta Air Show, creativity and gaming converge at PlayCon Malta, and history comes alive at Birgu by Candlelight, where the city’s streets are illuminated by tradition and atmosphere.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Imotska krajina
programme.desc: Imotski, known for its stunning Red and Blue Lakes, draws nature lovers and active travelers alike. During a local marenda break, host Jurica Grbavac introduced us to regional flavors—pivca and pura, a true taste of Imotski tradition.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Mediterranean Festivals
programme.desc: From classical opera to electronic beats, the Mediterranean showcases its finest cultural experiences. Italy’s Puccini Festival brings timeless melodies to Tuscan venues, Malta’s Isle of MTV and Glitch Festival offer modern music spectacles, Spain’s Pirineos Sur Festival celebrates world music in mountain landscapes, and Greece’s Supa Dupa Fly Festival blends urban culture, music, and street art in a festival like no other.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 04 France
programme.desc: France, where the sun shines on the Mediterranean, and there is a lot of culture and style. Along the beautiful French Riviera, from Nice to Marseille, France shows off a lively mix of history, food, and coastal life that has shaped the Mediterranean's spirit.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Join Rick as we explore Andalucía - prancing horses, whitewashed hilltowns, kite surfing on sunny beaches. Then we'll summit the Rock of Gibraltar and sample Morocco, from tribal musicians and busy artisans to the magic of its markets

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The flavors of land and sea are brought together in the kitchen, with prawn linguine, a light and savory pasta dish brimming with fresh Mediterranean seafood. For dessert, galaktompoureko, a traditional Greek custard-filled pastry with golden, crispy layers, provides a sweet and indulgent finale. An episode celebrating the best of classic Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)
programme.desc: On Brač, famed for its white stone, Zlatni Rat beach, and Vidova Gora, we stopped in Supetar to taste tradition. Restaurateur Teo Dragičević served us šporka juha, mišanca, and vitalac—authentic island flavors rooted in Brač’s rich culinary heritage.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Carnival Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Step into a world of color, music, and masks as the Mediterranean celebrates its iconic carnivals. Malta’s Karnival Malta lights up the streets with parades and flamboyant costumes. In Slovenia, the Carnival in Cerknica keeps centuries-old traditions alive, and Italy’s legendary Venice Carnival mesmerizes with elegance and historic pageantry. This is celebration at its most spectacular.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Full of hearty, traditional flavors, this dish features barley bread, a rustic and wholesome staple, paired with black-eyed beans cooked to perfection for a satisfying and nutritious meal. An episode celebrating the simplicity and richness of timeless Mediterranean recipes.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia
programme.desc: From the historic medina of Tunis to coastal towns full of local traditions, Tunisia reveals a rich tapestry of culture, flavours, and Mediterranean life shaped by diverse civilisations.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Exploring Croatia, Montenegro, and Bosnia, we’ll get to know the three major groups of the former Yugoslavia, Croats, Serbs, and Bosniaks, before enjoying a bit of fun in the sun along the Adriatic in Dubrovnik.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Property Transfer: Protection vs Efficiency
programme.desc: As property markets evolve, the laws governing ownership and transfer must evolve with them. This panel investigates how legal structures can protect buyers and investors without slowing progress, and what reforms are needed to ensure efficient, transparent, and future-ready property transfer across the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Med Minds 01 Caravaggio
programme.desc: Caravaggio, the rebellious Mediterranean painter, lived fiercely and left a legacy as bold as his character.

programme.title: Med Nations 11 Tunisia

programme.title: Origini
programme.desc: Valentina Caruso and Francesco Gasparri explore the Strait of Messina, where unique underwater currents create an oceanic ecosystem within the Mediterranean. Diver Domenico Majolino and marine biologist Simona Ratti explain its natural wonders, while Vincenzo Annuario tells the story of the Cariddi ferry, reborn after serving in the navy. At the National Archaeological Museum of Reggio Calabria, we discover the legacy of Magna Grecia and the famous Riace Bronzes. The 1908 earthquake that devastated Messina and Reggio Calabria is commemorated at the Regional Museum of Messina with the exhibition "1908 City Museum".

programme.title: Jesenice

programme.title: Il Provinciale
programme.desc: Federico Quaranta explores Sardinia’s ancient soul, from the Nuragic site of Su Nuraxi to the mystical Domus de Janas and the ruins of Tharros. The journey weaves through history, legend, and nature — from wild horses on the Giara di Gesturi to the mining village of Montevecchio. With local voices and musicians, the episode captures Sardinia’s deep identity and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Tuscanys Dolce Vita
programme.desc: We enjoy the charms of rural Tuscany's "sweet life" as we hunt for truffles in an oak forest, nibble on artichokes, and cruise through cypress groves in a classic convertible.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Tartarus: The Damned of the Earth descends into the deepest abyss of the Greek underworld, where the most cursed souls are imprisoned. Here dwell legendary figures punished for defying the gods, bound by eternal torment. This dark realm serves as a chilling reminder of divine justice and the price of hubris. A myth that explores punishment, morality, and the shadow side of eternity.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Concerto per Milano 2022
programme.desc: The Filarmonica della Scala and principal conductor Riccardo Chailly return to Piazza Duomo for the evocative Concerto per Milano. A landmark cultural event, this open-air performance brings world-class music to the heart of the city. Television direction by Stefania Grimaldi captures the grandeur and emotion of the evening.

programme.desc: Morocco! The bridge between Africa and the Mediterranean. Morocco's lively markets, delicious foods, and long-standing traditions show how trade, travellers, and different cultures have shaped the country over the years.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Music Festivals All Over the Med
programme.desc: The Mediterranean comes alive to the sound of music! From Malta’s high-energy Rock the South and sophisticated Malta Jazz Festival, to Italy’s cutting-edge Limbo Festival, Spain’s forward-thinking Sonar Festival, and Turkey’s classical and contemporary Istanbul Music Festival, every corner of the region vibrates with rhythm, passion, and creativity.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Traditional and modern flavors combined with sheftalia, the classic Cypriot sausage made with chicken mince, paired with a refreshing lemon cheesecake mousse for dessert. A delicious blend of savory heritage and sweet indulgence that celebrates Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Nations 05 Morocco
programme.desc: Morocco! The bridge between Africa and the Mediterranean. Morocco's lively markets, delicious foods, and long-standing traditions show how trade, travellers, and different cultures have shaped the country over the years.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: MED Destination FLORENCE
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Building for Centuries Panel
programme.desc: What does it take to build something that lasts centuries? This panel examines how sustainability, environmental awareness, and long-term thinking are reshaping architecture and development, moving beyond short-term solutions toward a legacy of resilient, future-proof spaces.

programme.title: Med Minds 09 Hypatia
programme.desc: Hypatia, the brilliant philosopher of the Mediterranean, became a timeless symbol of knowledge, reason, and courage.

programme.title: Med Nations 05 Morocco
programme.desc: Morocco! The bridge between Africa and the Mediterranean. Morocco's lively markets, delicious foods, and long-standing traditions show how trade, travellers, and different cultures have shaped the country over the years.

programme.title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.desc: Accompany, contain, support: three key concepts defining Italy's iconic culinary creations—bread, cakes, and pizza. Bread, a fundamental staple, complements dishes while holding symbolic meaning. Savory pies, rooted in medieval tradition, have remained unchanged through centuries. Lastly, pizza, an ancient grain-based dish, achieved global fame after merging with tomatoes in Naples. Massimo Montanari leads us through this rich and flavorful journey.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: Whats On Bridges of Art and Cinema Turkey
programme.desc: Turkey’s cultural landscape is shaped by cinema, contemporary art, and live performance, from the Adana Golden Boll Film Festival, celebrating national and regional filmmaking, to the Istanbul Biennial, a major platform for international contemporary art. Music and the performing arts take centre stage through the Istanbul Music Festival, Istanbul Theatre Festival, and Istanbul Jazz Festival, reflecting the country’s role as a crossroads of Mediterranean and global culture.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Granada
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Granada, in Spain’s Andalucía region, discovering its rich history, vibrant culture, and world-famous charm. She visits the stunning Alhambra, enjoys a delicious tapas tour, and experiences the passion of flamenco. Granada’s blend of Moorish heritage and modern energy makes it one of Spain’s most captivating cities. Special thanks to Gayle for an incredible tapas tour!

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature Ep 5
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: A sweet and comforting duo with skillet apple pie, warm and fragrant with tender apples and buttery crust, paired with soft, chocolatey crinkle cookies. An episode celebrating indulgent desserts and the cozy flavors of home baking.

programme.title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.desc: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Min Chung, presents a symphonic concert dedicated to the iconic soundtracks from Stanley Kubrick's films. The programme features orchestral interpretations of memorable scores that have shaped Kubrick's cinematic legacy, blending classical masterpieces with evocative film music for a powerful and immersive experience.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.
